sandbox.removeHint: Hint: You must remove clauses containing the selected literal.

results.msgContradictionEntailment: An empty clause was derived. This proves that the negated conclusion contradicts the premises. Therefore, the original entailment holds true!
results.msgContradictionSatisfiable: An empty clause was derived. This means the set of clauses is unsatisfiable.
results.msgEmptySetEntailment: All clauses were reduced and the set is empty, but no contradiction was found. Therefore, the entailment does NOT hold.
results.msgEmptySetSatisfiable: All clauses were reduced and the set is empty. This means the original set of clauses is satisfiable (consistent).

engine.negateConclusion: Negated the conclusion and added it to the set.

sandbox.removedPureLiteral: Clause removed because "{{literal}}" is a pure literal.
sandbox.errInvalidRemoval: This clause is not a tautology, is not subsumed, and has no pure literals.
sandbox.errSystemMemory: System Error: Clause not found in memory. Please click Start Over.
sandbox.errDuplicate: You have already resolved this exact pair.
sandbox.errInvalidMatch: Invalid move! These clauses do not resolve on "{{literal}}".
sandbox.errMustRemoveTarget: You must remove clauses containing the selected literal.
sandbox.resolutionDoneSweep: All resolutions for "{{literal}}" are done. Now you must manually remove all clauses containing "{{literal}}".
sandbox.phaseSweep: All pairs for "{{literal}}" resolved. Now remove clauses containing it.
sandbox.phaseReductionAfter: All done resolving on "{{literal}}". Now perform reduction.
sandbox.phaseSelectLiteral: Select a literal to resolve on.
